allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "[jJ]ava|[jJ]dk|[jJ]re|[aA]doptium|[eE]clipse" } | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($candidates = @\("C:\\Program Files\\Java", "C:\\Program Files\\Eclipse Adoptium", "C:\\Program Files\\BellSoft", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft", "C:\\Program Files\\JetBrains", "C:\\Users\\Fang2\\.jdks"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $c\) { Get-ChildItem $c -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.FullName } } })
